calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 30, 2014, is admitted to probate. Ikuko Satoda Sullivan is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 20, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by July 13, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Continued To Jul-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
